testcase.name: CategoriesService findAll should return an array of categories

testcase.classname: CategoriesService findOne should return a category by id
testcase.name: CategoriesService findOne should return a category by id

testcase.classname: CategoriesService update should update a category
testcase.name: CategoriesService update should update a category

testcase.classname: CategoriesService update should throw an error if category not found
